description: Users need a notification center where they can see unread badges, open a notification list, mark notifications read or unread, filter by read state, and clear all read notifications.

userStories.title: Add schema for notification read state
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to store notification read state so that it persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification read state column or table exists

userStories.title: Add backend endpoints for notifications
userStories.description: As a developer, I want endpoints to fetch, update, filter, and clear notifications so that the UI can function.
acceptanceCriteria: Endpoints support fetching, marking read/unread, filtering, and clearing read notifications

userStories.title: Show unread notification badges
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see unread badges so that I know I have new notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Unread badge is displayed when there are unread notifications
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add notification list UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to open a notification list so that I can see my notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add mark read/unread controls
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage them.
acceptanceCriteria: Controls exist to mark read or unread
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add filter by read state UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter by read state so that I can easily find unread notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add clear all read notifications UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that I can clean up my list.
acceptanceCriteria: Button exists to clear all read notifications
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
